## What kind of change is this?

- [ ] New skill (added to `commands/`)
- [ ] Skill enhancement (existing command updated)
- [ ] Bug fix in existing skill
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Repo infrastructure (CI, hooks, templates)

## Verification

<!-- How did you confirm this works? Skills are end-user-facing, so verify by USING them. -->

- [ ] Tested the skill in a real Claude Code session
- [ ] Ran `/security-check` if security-relevant
- [ ] Output checked against expected behavior described in skill docs
- [ ] N/A — see justification

## Risk

- [ ] Low — additive (new skill, new docs)
- [ ] Medium — modifies existing skill behavior; users may see different output
- [ ] High — breaking change to a skill's invocation, output format, or side effects

## User-facing changes

<!-- Anyone using this skills repo will see this on next gstack-sync or pull. Be explicit. -->

- [ ] No user-facing change
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] README.md updated if relevant
